description: Vertical graphic in a dark color scheme. The top two-thirds shows a dark-blue textured wall lit by a single ceiling-mounted light casting a triangular beam downward; the bottom third shows three people in helmets and body armor seen from behind, lit from behind in a blue-tinted scene. Overlaid in large bold sans-serif type are the words 'CASE' (white) and 'SPOTLIGHT' (golden yellow). In the lower-left corner is a circular metallic emblem reading 'HOMELAND SECURITY TASK FORCE' around the rim with 'INTEGRITY · VIGILANCE · UNITY' at the bottom, with an eagle, a shield with a U.S. flag motif, and stars.
notable_text: CASE SPOTLIGHT; HOMELAND SECURITY TASK FORCE; INTEGRITY · VIGILANCE · UNITY
